# WeaveFFI .NET Bindings

Auto-generated P/Invoke bindings for the WeaveFFI native library.

## Build

```bash
dotnet build
```

## Pack

```bash
dotnet pack
```

The resulting `.nupkg` will be in `bin/Debug/` (or `bin/Release/` with `-c Release`).

<!-- END README.md -->
